rows.label: tev061501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about events since Lana came to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Lana if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Lana what happened during the attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0001
rows.name:
All of sudden Bubu insist on
moving to NLA, so here Lana is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0002
rows.name:
But expensive nopopotamus not
grow on trees! And living in
city requires lot of investment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lana starting to worry about family
finances. Only way to get money
is to work Bubu like slave...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Er, Lana mean that Bubu should
work hard and invest in future
of family! Yes. That it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0005
rows.name:
If friend know any good products
to sell, please tell Bubu, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Lana have more problems
than are countable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0009
rows.name:
But biggest problem is
clingy husband, Bubu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Everyone tell Lana that Bubu
just worried about Lana...
That Bubu looooove Lana...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0011
rows.name:
But Lana cannot even get alone
time to go shopping, or talk to
friends, or even take bath![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Only comfort of Lana is
sneaking off at night and
having secret talks with Walolo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0020
rows.name: Lana is mortified to say this, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0021
rows.name:
right when Growth attacked and
city was most in danger...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0022
rows.name:
husband Bubu try to offer friends money
to become bodyguard of Lana! Meeeeeh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0023
rows.name:
Now everyone in city probably think
Lana is spoiled, selfish Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Sometimes Lana wish Bubu
would jump off cliff![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Er, by which Lana mean that dear
Bubu should think of everyone and
not just Lana. Yes. That it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Lana about business.

rows.label: tev061501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Lana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Before, cuteness of Lana used to
be like ball and chain that kept
Lana from living life of dreams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0027
rows.name:
But then Lana realize
cuteness is marketable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Shake Lana's hand for just 100 credits! Ruffle
fur of Lana for just 10,000 credits! Go for
walk with Lana for just 1,000,000 credits![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0029
rows.name:
Lana going to work it big
time and make major coin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0033
rows.name:
Bubu is suddenly acting
so manly and cool![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0034
rows.name:
Lana always know that Bubu was
better catch than economically-challenged
weakling like Walolo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0035
rows.name:
Anyway, thanks for bringing
Lana home to city, friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0036
rows.name:
Lana is going to turn over new leaf
and find happiness here in NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Lana about business.

rows.label: tev061501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Lana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Lana needs to think up some new
products in order to make living here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Aha! Human friends like small,
round, fluffy things like Nopon,
right? Then Lana have great idea...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Lana will manufacture more of these
and sell fake littlepon to friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Huh? Mo-mo! Lana mean stuffed animals
that LOOK like littlepon! Not that own
littlepon is fake! Do not get wrong idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0044
rows.name:
There, there. ...Whew!
Raising littlepon is hard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Can friend not see Lana is busy?
Go make self useful and tell
Bubu that Lana say bye-bye![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0046
rows.name:
Walolo will be taking care of Lana from
now on. Lana going to live in fast lane![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0047
rows.name:
...Heh heh. Everything is going
according to plan. Lana finally
free to do whatever Lana want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0048
rows.name:
It is not fault of Lana
that Lana so pretty...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0049
rows.name:
Bubu need to stop suffocating Lana.
Lana wants to be free as soaring bird![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0050
rows.name:
These secret talks with Walolo
are only comfort for poor Lana.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061501_MSG0051
rows.name:
Lana knows that with Walolo
around, everything will be okay.[ST:wait ]
